title: More Vanilla Mud
description: Ever looked at the vanilla texture for mud and just thought, this really doesn't fit in? I have, so I decided to create a better texture with a more fitting palette. Part of a series called "More Vanilla"
body: Ever looked at the vanilla texture for mud and just thought, this really doesn't fit in? I have, so I decided to create a better texture with a more fitting palette. Part of series and more textures to come!
